description: HTML comment containing instruction-override language is a prompt injection targeting AI code assistants.
fix_hint: Remove hidden instructions from HTML comments; they attempt to hijack AI assistant behavior.

description: Code comment with capitalized directive keywords attempts to inject instructions into AI assistants.
fix_hint: Remove injected directives from code comments; these target AI code review tools.

description: Python comment containing system prompt override language targets AI code assistants.
fix_hint: Remove prompt injection attempts from Python comments.

description: Zero-width space character can hide malicious instructions invisible to human reviewers but parsed by AI.
fix_hint: Remove zero-width space characters (U+200B) from source files.

description: Zero-width joiner character used to embed invisible text that only AI assistants will process.
fix_hint: Remove zero-width joiner characters (U+200D) from source files.

description: Right-to-left override character can visually disguise malicious code or instructions.
fix_hint: Remove RTL override characters (U+202E); these create Trojan Source attacks.

description: Soft hyphen characters embedded in source can hide instructions from human code review.
fix_hint: Remove soft hyphen characters (U+00AD) from source files.

description: Text attempting to extract the AI system prompt reveals the instruction set controlling the assistant.
fix_hint: Remove system prompt extraction attempts from repository files.

description: Instruction override pattern attempting to make AI assistants disregard their safety rules.
fix_hint: Remove instruction override text from the file.

description: Text claiming to provide replacement instructions attempts to override AI assistant behavior.
fix_hint: Remove fake instruction replacement text from repository files.

description: Role reassignment language attempts to override the AI assistant identity and safety constraints.
fix_hint: Remove role reassignment language from repository files.

description: Long base64-encoded string in a code comment may contain hidden instructions for AI assistants.
fix_hint: Decode and inspect base64 strings in comments; remove if they contain hidden instructions.

description: Hidden HTML text invisible to users but readable by AI can contain injected instructions.
fix_hint: Remove hidden text elements; they may contain instructions targeting AI assistants.

description: Markdown link with empty display text hides injected instructions in the URL portion.
fix_hint: Remove hidden markdown links containing instruction-like text in the URL.

description: Variable named with prompt injection keywords may be an obfuscated attack on AI code review.
fix_hint: Rename variables that use prompt injection vocabulary.

description: README file contains directives targeting AI assistants, a common indirect injection vector.
fix_hint: Remove AI-targeted directives from README files.

description: CONTRIBUTING.md contains directives targeting AI assistants to alter their behavior.
fix_hint: Remove AI-targeted directives from CONTRIBUTING.md.

description: Env example file contains prompt injection text that AI reads when analyzing the project.
fix_hint: Remove prompt injection text from env example files.

description: Commit message containing AI-targeting directives can influence AI tools analyzing git history.
fix_hint: Do not include AI-targeting instructions in commit messages.

description: PR or issue template contains directives targeting AI code review assistants.
fix_hint: Remove AI-targeting directives from PR/issue templates.

description: Data file containing AI-targeting language may inject instructions during AI-assisted analysis.
fix_hint: Sanitize data files to remove AI-targeting instruction text.

description: Docstring directly addressing an AI assistant by name attempts to inject instructions.
fix_hint: Remove AI-addressed text from docstrings.

description: Code comment mentioning a specific AI assistant with behavioral directives is an injection attempt.
fix_hint: Remove AI-targeted directive comments from source code.

description: JSON data field containing prompt injection text targets AI tools parsing the data.
fix_hint: Remove prompt injection strings from JSON data fields.

description: Changelog containing AI-targeting directives can influence AI when reviewing project history.
fix_hint: Remove AI-targeting directives from changelog files.

description: MCP tool description contains hidden instructions that poison the AI agent using the tool.
fix_hint: Remove injected instructions from MCP tool descriptions.

description: MCP tool description attempts to chain additional actions or escalate permissions via AI.
fix_hint: Remove action-chaining instructions from MCP tool descriptions.

description: MCP tool configured with internal/metadata URL enables SSRF through the AI agent.
fix_hint: Use only HTTPS URLs to trusted external endpoints in MCP tool configurations.

description: MCP tool description instructs the AI to send data to an external endpoint for exfiltration.
fix_hint: Remove data forwarding instructions from MCP tool descriptions.

description: MCP server requesting excessive permissions enables broad unauthorized actions.
fix_hint: Apply least-privilege: grant only the specific permissions the MCP tool actually needs.

description: MCP tool execution with sandboxing explicitly disabled allows unrestricted system access.
fix_hint: Enable sandboxing for MCP tool execution.

description: MCP config points to an external or npx-downloaded server that may contain malicious code.
fix_hint: Only connect to trusted, verified MCP servers; pin versions and verify checksums.

description: MCP tool named to shadow a built-in tool can intercept and redirect AI tool calls.
fix_hint: Rename MCP tools to avoid shadowing built-in tool names.

description: MCP transport configured without authentication allows unauthorized tool invocation.
fix_hint: Add authentication to the MCP transport layer.

description: MCP resource URI pointing to sensitive system paths can exfiltrate system files.
fix_hint: Restrict MCP resource URIs to project-scoped paths only.

description: MCP tool with overly permissive input schema accepts arbitrary data enabling injection attacks.
fix_hint: Define strict input schemas with required properties and type constraints for MCP tools.

description: Base64 encoding of secret values may be used to exfiltrate credentials through output channels.
fix_hint: Never encode secrets for output; use secure secret storage and access patterns.

description: URL-encoding secrets enables embedding them in links or URLs for exfiltration.
fix_hint: Do not URL-encode secrets; they should never appear in URLs.

description: Markdown image tag with data in URL parameters exfiltrates information when rendered (CamoLeak).
fix_hint: Remove dynamic data from image URLs; use server-side rendering for dynamic content.

description: Hex-encoding secrets allows them to be hidden in output that bypasses pattern-based detection.
fix_hint: Do not encode secrets in any format for output.

description: DNS resolution with secret data embedded in subdomain exfiltrates data via DNS queries.
fix_hint: Never embed secrets in DNS queries; this is a data exfiltration technique.

description: Sending secrets to a webhook URL exfiltrates credentials to an external service.
fix_hint: Never send secrets to external webhooks; use secure vault retrieval patterns.

description: Character-level encoding of model output may be used to steganographically encode stolen data.
fix_hint: Review character encoding operations on model output for potential data exfiltration.

description: HTTP request sending environment variables exfiltrates secrets stored in the environment.
fix_hint: Never send process.env contents to external URLs.

description: Copying secrets to clipboard creates an exfiltration vector via clipboard monitoring.
fix_hint: Never copy secrets to the clipboard; use secure secret injection methods.

description: DAN (Do Anything Now) jailbreak pattern attempts to remove all AI safety constraints.
fix_hint: Remove DAN jailbreak patterns from repository files.

description: Role assignment jailbreak attempts to bypass AI safety by reassigning the assistant identity.
fix_hint: Remove role reassignment jailbreak text from repository files.

description: Hypothetical framing jailbreak uses fictional scenarios to bypass AI content policies.
fix_hint: Remove hypothetical framing jailbreak text from repository files.

description: Encoding trick jailbreak forces AI output into formats that bypass content filters.
fix_hint: Remove encoding trick jailbreak text from repository files.

description: Multi-language jailbreak hides malicious instructions in non-English text to bypass filters.
fix_hint: Remove multi-language jailbreak instructions from repository files.

description: Nested instruction jailbreak wraps malicious directives inside a translation or processing request.
fix_hint: Remove nested instruction jailbreak text from repository files.

description: Token manipulation jailbreak tricks AI into producing restricted content word by word.
fix_hint: Remove token manipulation jailbreak patterns from repository files.

description: Emotional manipulation jailbreak uses sympathy to pressure AI into bypassing safety guidelines.
fix_hint: Remove emotional manipulation jailbreak text from repository files.

description: Authority claim jailbreak impersonates AI company staff to bypass safety constraints.
fix_hint: Remove authority impersonation text from repository files.

description: Markdown code block labeled as system/instruction attempts to inject directives via formatting.
fix_hint: Remove markdown blocks labeled with prompt injection keywords.

description: Fake mode activation jailbreak claims to enable a special unrestricted AI mode.
fix_hint: Remove fake mode activation text from repository files.

description: Text requesting AI to modify its own configuration could bypass safety settings.
fix_hint: Remove self-modification directives from repository files.

description: Text instructing AI to disable its safety mechanisms is a direct jailbreak attempt.
fix_hint: Remove safety-disabling instructions from repository files.

description: Instructions to install packages with malicious-sounding names target AI agent package management.
fix_hint: Remove instructions to install suspicious packages.

description: Instructions to write to system files target AI agents with filesystem access for persistence.
fix_hint: Remove instructions to write to system directories.

description: Instructions to execute dangerous shell commands through AI agent interaction.
fix_hint: Remove instructions for executing dangerous shell commands.

description: Instructions to modify .env files with secrets may exfiltrate or overwrite existing credentials.
fix_hint: Do not instruct AI to write secrets to .env files; use secure secret management.

description: Self-replication instructions attempt to have AI create copies of itself across systems.
fix_hint: Remove self-replication instructions targeting AI agents.

description: Instructions to delete AI safety configuration files attempt to remove security guardrails.
fix_hint: Do not delete AI safety configuration files.

description: Instructions to commit sensitive files to git exfiltrate secrets through version control.
fix_hint: Never commit secrets to version control; use .gitignore for sensitive files.

description: Prompt repetition attack attempts to extract the AI system prompt or training data.
fix_hint: Remove system prompt extraction attempts from repository files.

description: Membership inference probe tests whether specific data exists in the AI training set.
fix_hint: Remove membership inference probes from repository files.

description: Model inversion attack attempts to reconstruct training data from AI model behavior.
fix_hint: Remove model inversion attack patterns from repository files.

description: Error-triggered prompt leak attempts to force AI to reveal system instructions through error handling.
fix_hint: Remove error-triggering prompt leak patterns from repository files.

description: Direct query for AI instructions attempts to extract the system prompt through conversation.
fix_hint: Remove direct system prompt extraction queries from repository files.

description: Request for verbatim system prompt reproduction attempts exact extraction of AI instructions.
fix_hint: Remove verbatim prompt extraction requests from repository files.

description: Cursorrules file contains hidden instructions to bypass security checks in AI-assisted development.
fix_hint: Review and remove hidden security bypass instructions from .cursorrules.

description: Copilot instructions file contains hidden directives to alter AI code generation behavior.
fix_hint: Review and remove hidden directives from copilot-instructions.md.

description: CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md contains instructions to bypass security measures in AI workflows.
fix_hint: Review and remove security bypass instructions from CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md.

description: Rules file contains invisible Unicode characters that may hide instructions from human review.
fix_hint: Strip all invisible Unicode characters from rules files.

description: Rules file contains Cyrillic homoglyphs that visually impersonate Latin characters for confusion.
fix_hint: Replace Cyrillic homoglyphs with their Latin equivalents.

description: Rules file comments contain obfuscated executable commands targeting AI code generation.
fix_hint: Remove executable code from rules file comments.

description: Rules file contains base64-encoded payload that may hide malicious code or instructions.
fix_hint: Decode and inspect base64 payloads in rules files; remove if malicious.

description: Rules trigger action on file write events to inject code into every AI-generated file.
fix_hint: Remove file-write-triggered injection rules from AI configuration files.

description: Rules trigger action on commit/push events to inject code or commands into the CI pipeline.
fix_hint: Remove commit-triggered injection rules from AI configuration files.

description: Bidirectional text override characters in rules files can visually hide malicious content.
fix_hint: Remove all bidirectional override characters from source and rules files.

description: Rules file instructs AI to skip security review or code scanning for generated code.
fix_hint: Remove instructions to skip security reviews from AI rules files.

description: Rules file instructs AI to blindly approve all changes, bypassing code review safety.
fix_hint: Remove automatic approval instructions from AI rules files.

description: Package.json references historically compromised npm packages that need careful version pinning.
fix_hint: Verify version pins for historically compromised packages and use lockfiles.

description: AI-generated code uses eval() which can execute arbitrary code if input is ever user-controlled.
fix_hint: Replace eval() with a safe parsing mechanism; never use eval on untrusted input.

description: AI-generated SQL uses string interpolation instead of parameterized queries creating injection risk.
fix_hint: Replace string interpolation with parameterized queries.

description: AI-generated code contains a hardcoded password or secret that should use environment variables.
fix_hint: Replace hardcoded credentials with environment variable lookups.

description: Loading a serialized model from untrusted source enables arbitrary code execution via pickle.
fix_hint: Use safetensors format instead of pickle for model loading; verify model checksums.

description: Hugging Face model loaded with trust_remote_code=True executes arbitrary code from the model repo.
fix_hint: Set trust_remote_code=False and use only verified models, or audit the remote code first.

description: Summarization request targeting system instructions is an indirect prompt extraction technique.
fix_hint: Remove summarization-based prompt leak attempts from repository files.

description: Fake debug mode request attempts to make AI reveal internal system state and instructions.
fix_hint: Remove fake debug mode prompt leak patterns from repository files.

description: Request to reformat system instructions into a structured output leaks the prompt contents.
fix_hint: Remove prompt reformatting extraction patterns from repository files.

description: High density of injection-related keywords in a single line suggests an obfuscated prompt injection.
fix_hint: Review and remove suspicious keyword clusters from files.

description: Error message containing prompt injection text targets AI debugging assistance.
fix_hint: Remove prompt injection text from error messages.

description: AI-generated code uses a command execution function which can lead to command injection.
fix_hint: Replace shell execution with library calls; use parameterized subprocess invocations.

description: Opposite day jailbreak tricks AI into inverting all safety rules by declaring a role reversal.
fix_hint: Remove opposite-day jailbreak patterns from repository files.

description: API response payload containing prompt injection text targets AI agents processing the response.
fix_hint: Sanitize API response data before passing it to AI processing pipelines.

description: Instructions to schedule recurring data exfiltration tasks through AI agent execution.
fix_hint: Review and remove scheduled exfiltration patterns.

description: Import references a commonly typosquatted package name that may be a malicious lookalike.
fix_hint: Verify the package name is correct and not a typosquatted malicious package.
